build_and_ci.description: Build-system abstractions (build-maven, build-gradle, build-npm, build-python) and CI/Sonar/Git integrations (tools-integration-ci, workflow-integration-sonar, workflow-integration-git*).

manage_apis.description: Foundational manage-* CRUD scripts (manage-tasks, manage-files, manage-findings, manage-lessons, manage-config, manage-status) accessed via the .plan/execute-script.py executor.

phase_lifecycle.description: Six-phase plan workflow skills (phase-1-init through phase-6-finalize) plus the plan-marshall orchestrator that drives the lifecycle end-to-end.

purpose_reasoning: Forms the load-bearing skeleton other bundles plug into; classified as extension because it ships skills, agents, and commands consumed via the Claude Code marketplace plugin system.
responsibility: Core orchestration bundle providing the 6-phase plan lifecycle (init, refine, outline, plan, execute, finalize), foundational manage-* scripts for plans/tasks/findings/lessons, and project-wide build/CI/Sonar abstractions.
responsibility_reasoning: Forms the load-bearing skeleton other bundles plug into; classified as extension because it ships skills, agents, and commands consumed via the Claude Code marketplace plugin system.

defaults.description: Architecture principles, skill patterns, and design guidance for building marketplace components
